stemHtml: An aircraft enters a holding pattern at 15:40 UTC. ATC clears it to exit and commence approach at 15:46 UTC. A full pattern takes 4 minutes. What should the pilot do?

options.a: Adjust the holding within safe limits to remain in the protected zone.
options.b: Fly a 6-minute holding to stay in the safe zone.
options.d: Leave the holding and request a visual approach on a direct heading.
